name: Porkbun
description: Porkbun domain registrar — register and manage domains, DNS records, nameservers, URL forwarding, glue records, and SSL certificates. Authenticates via X-API-Key + X-Secret-API-Key headers.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Porkbun API key (starts with 'pk1_'). Generate at https://porkbun.com/account/api. Must be enabled per-domain unless you tick 'Enable API Access' on each domain in your control panel.

credential_fields.name: secret_api_key
credential_fields.label: Secret API Key
credential_fields.description: Porkbun secret API key (starts with 'sk1_'), generated alongside the API key.

tools.name: ping
tools.description: Test API credentials and return the caller's public IP. Returns { status, yourIp, credentialsValid }. Use this to verify credentials are working before making other calls.

tools.name: get_pricing
tools.description: Public domain pricing across all TLDs Porkbun sells. No credentials required, but cheapest to call once and cache — pricing rarely changes intra-day. Returns a map of TLD → { registration, renewal, transfer } prices.

tools.name: list_domains
tools.description: Paginated list of all domains in the account, ordered by expiration date ascending. Returns up to 1000 per page; paginate by incrementing 'start' by 1000. Empty domains array means you've reached the end.

includeLabels.description: Include user-defined labels in the response

tools.name: check_availability
tools.description: Check whether a domain is available for registration and return its price. Counts against your daily availability-check quota.

domain.description: Fully-qualified domain name to check (e.g. example.com)

tools.name: register_domain
tools.description: Register a new domain. ⚠️ This SPENDS REAL MONEY against your account balance. The price is whatever get_pricing currently returns for the TLD. Make sure to confirm with the user before calling.

whoisPrivacy.description: Enable WHOIS privacy (free with all Porkbun registrations)

tools.name: renew_domain
tools.description: Renew a domain for the specified number of years. ⚠️ Spends account balance.

tools.name: transfer_domain
tools.description: Initiate a domain transfer in to Porkbun. ⚠️ Spends account balance (transfer price).

authcode.description: EPP/auth code from the losing registrar

tools.name: get_transfer_status
tools.description: Status of a single in-progress domain transfer.

tools.name: list_transfers
tools.description: List all active domain transfers on the account.

tools.name: update_auto_renew
tools.description: Enable or disable auto-renewal for a domain.

tools.name: get_nameservers
tools.description: Get the authoritative nameservers currently set on a domain.

tools.name: update_nameservers
tools.description: Replace a domain's nameservers with the supplied list (1-13 entries). Setting nameservers to anything other than Porkbun's DNS effectively disables DNS-record management for that domain.

tools.name: get_glue_records
tools.description: List all glue records (in-bailiwick A/AAAA records published in the parent zone) for a domain.

tools.name: create_glue_record
tools.description: Create a glue record on a subdomain (required when running your own nameservers like ns1.example.com from inside example.com).

ips.description: IPv4 and/or IPv6 addresses for the glue record

tools.name: update_glue_record
tools.description: Update the IPs on an existing glue record.

tools.name: delete_glue_record
tools.description: Delete a glue record.

tools.name: list_dns_records
tools.description: Retrieve all DNS records for a domain. Returns an array of records each with id, name (FQDN), type, content, ttl, prio, notes.

tools.name: get_dns_record
tools.description: Retrieve a single DNS record by its numeric record ID.

tools.name: list_dns_records_by_type
tools.description: Retrieve DNS records filtered by name and type. Useful for fetching e.g. all MX records or the A record for a specific subdomain without paging through all records.

subdomain.description: Subdomain part only ('' for root, 'www' for www.example.com)

tools.name: create_dns_record
tools.description: Create a new DNS record. Returns { status, id }. To create a record at the apex (root), set name to ''.

name.description: Subdomain only (e.g. 'www', 'mail'). Use '' for the apex record. Do NOT include the parent domain.

content.description: Record value (IP for A/AAAA, target hostname for CNAME/MX, text for TXT, etc.)

prio.description: Priority — required for MX and SRV records

tools.name: edit_dns_record
tools.description: Replace a DNS record's contents by ID. Same fields as create_dns_record.

tools.name: edit_dns_records_by_type
tools.description: Replace ALL records matching a given (subdomain, type) tuple with the supplied content. Useful for atomically swapping e.g. all A records for www.

tools.name: delete_dns_record
tools.description: Delete a single DNS record by ID. Cannot be undone.

tools.name: delete_dns_records_by_type
tools.description: Delete ALL records matching a given (subdomain, type) tuple. Cannot be undone.

tools.name: get_dnssec_records
tools.description: Retrieve DNSSEC records (DS records) published at the registry for the domain.

tools.name: create_dnssec_record
tools.description: Add a DNSSEC DS record at the registry. The four fields (keyTag, alg, digestType, digest) come from your authoritative DNS provider.

maxSigLife.description: Optional max signature lifetime in seconds

tools.name: delete_dnssec_record
tools.description: Remove a DNSSEC DS record by its keyTag.

tools.name: list_url_forwards
tools.description: List all URL-forwarding rules for a domain.

tools.name: add_url_forward
tools.description: Add a URL-forwarding rule from a (sub)domain on this domain to a destination URL.

subdomain.description: Subdomain to forward from ('' for the apex)

includePath.description: Append the source request path to the destination

wildcard.description: Apply to all subdomains under the target

tools.name: delete_url_forward
tools.description: Delete a URL-forwarding rule by its numeric ID.

tools.name: retrieve_ssl
tools.description: Retrieve the SSL bundle (certificate chain + private key) for a domain that uses Porkbun-managed DNS. Free Let's Encrypt cert auto-issued by Porkbun. Returns { intermediatecertificate, certificatechain, privatekey, publickey }.

tools.name: get_account_balance
tools.description: Current account balance (in USD by default). Use before register_domain / renew_domain to verify funds.
